title: Monotone-Constrained Physics Specialist
summary: Official XGBoost and LightGBM docs both support monotonic constraints, and the best current features are already physics-like.
rationale: Official XGBoost and LightGBM docs both support monotonic constraints, and the best current features are already physics-like. Inference: a small constrained specialist can generalize better under year/race shift by forcing sensible directions on features like wear pressure, stop debt, and finish margin.
implementation_hint: Train a separate tree model only on interpretable strategy features and impose sign constraints where direction is genuinely defensible; use larger `max_bin` if needed, then stack it with the unconstrained main model.
expected_effect: Should reduce brittle threshold fitting and improve public-LB robustness even if raw CV gain is small.
risk: Wrong sign assumptions or over-constraining ambiguous features can flatten useful nonlinear structure.
